zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Montagu於1405年10月18日出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親Thomas Montagu17歲，母親Eleanor Holland18歲。她於1421年2月之前與Richard Neville在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1462年12月9日之前在英國英格蘭波克夏比善姆，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏比善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Montagu于1405年10月18日出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲Thomas Montagu17岁，母亲Eleanor Holland18岁。她于1421年2月之前与Richard Neville在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1462年12月9日之前在英国英格兰波克夏比善姆，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Montagu was born on 18 October 1405, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Thomas Montagu, was 17 and her mother, Eleanor Holland, was 18. She married Richard Neville before February 1421, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died before 9 December 1462, in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Montagu est née le 18 octobre 1405, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Montagu, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Holland, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Neville avant février 1421, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée avant 9 décembre 1462, à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat vor Februar 1421 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Richard Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb vor 9. Dezember 1462 in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Richard Neville prima del febbraio 1421, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Alice Montagu(이)가 1405년 10월 18일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Montagu(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Holland(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1421년 2월 이전 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Richard Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1462년 12월 9일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 비샤에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Montagu nasceu em 18 de outubro de 1405, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Montagu, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Holland, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Neville antes fevereiro de 1421, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 9 de dezembro de 1462, em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Montagu родилась 18 октября 1405 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Montagu было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Holland, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Neville перед февраль 1421 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла перед 9 декабрь 1462 г. в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
